function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_role()
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE
AS $function$
  select role
  from profiles
  where id = auth.uid();
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user_profile()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
begin
  insert into public.profiles (id, email, full_name, role, is_active)
  values (
    new.id,
    new.email,
    coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name', new.email),
    'seller',
    true
  )
  on conflict (id) do nothing;

  return new;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.refresh_mv_sales_by_product()
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
begin
  refresh materialized view public.mv_sales_by_product;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_order_totals()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_order_id uuid;
begin
  v_order_id := coalesce(new.order_id, old.order_id);

  update public.orders o
     set subtotal = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0),
         grand_total = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(o.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.tax_amount, 0),
         total = coalesce((
           select sum(oi.subtotal)
           from public.order_items oi
           where oi.order_id = v_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(o.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(o.tax_amount, 0),
         updated_at = now()
   where o.id = v_order_id;

  return null;
end;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.set_purchase_order_totals()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
declare
  v_purchase_order_id uuid;
begin
  v_purchase_order_id := coalesce(new.purchase_order_id, old.purchase_order_id);

  update public.purchase_orders po
     set subtotal = coalesce((
           select sum(poi.subtotal)
           from public.purchase_order_items poi
           where poi.purchase_order_id = v_purchase_order_id
         ), 0),
         total = coalesce((
           select sum(poi.subtotal)
           from public.purchase_order_items poi
           where poi.purchase_order_id = v_purchase_order_id
         ), 0)
         - coalesce(po.discount_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(po.shipping_amount, 0)
         + coalesce(po.tax_amount, 0),
         updated_at = now()
   where po.id = v_purchase_order_id;

  return null;
end;
$function$
